Lylia is vulnerable to heroes with strong lock, burst damage, and long-range zoning.

Lylia and Pharsa are evenly matched. Pharsa has long-range poke and strong zoning, while Lylia excels in close-range skirmishes and sustained damage. The matchup depends heavily on positioning and timing, as both heroes can pressure each other if played correctly.

dominants.dominant_desc: play from the backline and poke enemies aggressively using your skills. focus on clearing waves quickly and constantly pressure the enemy mid lane. manage your mana wisely and avoid overextending without vision. in team fights, keep your distance, deal continuous damage, and use your ultimate to reposition or escape when needed. prioritize poking and wearing down tanky heroes before fully committing.

hero.hero_weakness: Lylia struggles in the late game, depends a lot on her Ultimate, and can be easily taken down by hard CC and burst damage if she gets caught.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Tigreal can group enemies together in one spot creating the ideal scenario for Lylia to drop her bombs and unleash devastating burst damage. His knock-ups, slows, and ability to absorb pressure give Lylia the space she needs to play aggressively. This combo is especially deadly in team fights, where Tigreal locks enemies down and Lylia finishes them off with explosive follow-up.
Just like tigreal who can set up enemies with his ultimate and have slow making easier for lylia to drop her bombs and unleash a burst damage

counters.counter_desc: Franco is the ultimate counter to Lylia, thanks to his point and click suppression and powerful pick potential. With Bloody Hunt, he can lock Lylia down instantly, preventing her from using Black Shoes or escaping. His Iron Hook also adds constant threat from a distance, forcing Lylia to play more cautiously and limiting her ability to zone freely. Once Franco catches her, its usually game over making him the most effective hero for shutting down Lylia before she becomes a problem.

Lancelot is a strong counter to Lylia due to his high mobility, invincibility frames, and burst damage. With skills like Puncture and Thorned Rose, he can easily dodge her bombs while dishing out serious damage. His ultimate, Phantom Execution, allows him to dive in quickly and finish Lylia off before she can react with Black Shoes. Lancelot agile playstyle makes it difficult for Lylia to land her combos, giving him the upper hand in most encounters.

hero.hero_overview: Lilia is a very powerful magician and few people use her, and I consider her always dead in the game. She is considered a very flexible hero because of the strength of her skills.
hero.hero_strength: One of the advantages of this hero is the power of his explosions due to his first and second skills, which cause an explosion that merges enemies. As for the last skill, it is a wonderful skill for healing and restoring mana or escaping from enemies, and it has many advantages, so I consider Lilia a very strong hero.
hero.hero_weakness: One of the weaknesses of the hero that I hate is her weak mana, so you should buy a mana book in the first match so that you can help your team. She is also not a very dominant hero in the first match, and among the heroes who can control her are Eudora as a mage, Yin as a warrior, Fanny as an assassin, and Exia as a marksman.

emblems.emblem_desc: This emblem setup focuses on maximizing Lylia's damage output and item acquisition speed, making her a formidable presence in battles. By enhancing her magic power, reducing cooldowns, and increasing magic penetration, Lylia can effectively burst down enemies and maintain a strong presence throughout the game

equips.equip_desc: This build focuses on enhancing Lylia's damage output, mana sustainability, and crowd control capabilities, making her a formidable presence in battles.

hero.hero_overview: Lylia is a powerful mage hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang known for her burst damage and crowd control abilities. She specializes in dealing magic damage, with a focus on area-of-effect skills that can overwhelm enemies.
hero.hero_strength: Lylia excels at dealing significant magic damage in a short period. Her skills, especially her Magic Shockwave and Black Shoes, allow her to quickly burst down enemies, making her a powerful threat in both skirmishes and full team fights
hero.hero_weakness: Lylia's skills cost a significant amount of mana, and if she's not careful, she can run out of mana quickly in extended fights or when farming, which can leave her without the ability to deal damage or escape.

spell.spell_desc: Sprint increases Lylia's movement speed, allowing her to escape or chase enemies more effectively. Since Lylia is a mage that excels at kiting, Sprint can help her maintain a safe distance from enemies while dealing damage or secure a chase if an enemy tries to escape.

data.title: Lylia

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Choosing Tigreal as Lylia partner is a great decision due to his exceptional crowd control (CC) abilities and synergy with Lylia playstyle. Tigreal can initiate fights with his Implosion (Ultimate), pulling enemies together and leaving them vulnerable to Lylia AoE abilities. This allows Lylia to land her Magic Shockwave and Shadow Energy more effectively, maximizing her burst damage.

counters.counter_desc: Lylia has a strong advantage over Lancelot because her Black Shoes gives her an escape from his dashes, while her burst damage and crowd control can stop him from effectively closing the gap or engaging in fights

dominants.dominant_desc: For Lylia, focus on safe laning with Magic Shockwave and Shadow Energy to poke while avoiding overextension and ganks. In team fights, stay in the backline, using Black Shoes for repositioning. Start with Magic Shockwave, then follow up with Shadow Energy to deal AOE damage, and prioritize squishy targets like mages and marksmen. Stick with your team to maximize your impact and reduce risks
dominants.dominant_title: Lylia: Laning and Team Fight Strategies for Maximum Impact

emblems.emblem_desc: The best emblem for Lylia is the Custom Mage Emblem with magic penetration and cooldown reduction talents to maximize her burst damage, paired with Lethal Ignition for extra damage on continuous hits, making her highly effective in dominating the mid-lane and early fights.
emblems.emblem_title: Custom Mage Emblem: Lethal Burst Build

equips.equip_desc: This aggressive build allows Lylia to maximize her damage output while maintaining the mobility and cooldown reduction necessary for an aggressive mage. With Genius Wand and Lightning Truncheon, she can pierce through tanky enemies while dealing massive burst damage. The Holy Crystal and Blood Wings enhance her magic power, allowing her to deal even more damage. The Lethal Ignition talent boosts her damage even further, especially when hitting multiple targets in her skill rotations.

hero.hero_overview: Lylia is a high-mobility mage in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, known for her burst AOE damage, quick wave clear, and survivability with her ultimate, Black Shoes, making her a strong pick for outplaying enemies and dominating early to mid-game fights.
hero.hero_strength: Lylia  strengths lie in her exceptional mobility, high burst AOE damage, strong early-game dominance, and her ability to reset HP and mana with Black Shoes, making her hard to catch and perfect for hit-and-run tactics
hero.hero_weakness: Lylia main weaknesses are her squishy nature, reliance on proper positioning, vulnerability to crowd control, and her reduced effectiveness in the late game compared to other scaling heroes.

spell.spell_desc: The best battle spell for Lylia is Flicker because it gives her an extra escape option or helps her reposition during fights. Even though Lylia is already mobile, Flicker adds another layer of safety, especially when her ultimate, Black Shoes, is on cooldown. Its also useful for chasing down enemies who try to escape her burst damage.

data.title: Master the Aggression: A Pro Lylia Guide for Dominating the Lane

dominants.dominant_desc: Before reaching level 4, focus on harassing the enemy with Magic Shockwave while staying at a safe distance. Use Black Shoes to quickly escape danger or reposition. Prioritize wave clear to gain an early gold and experience advantage. Avoid engaging in risky fights, as Lylia is relatively weak early on. Instead, focus on farming and positioning to set up for a stronger mid-game once you unlock her ultimate.

emblems.emblem_desc: To improve its early to mid game performance, improve the cool down time.

equips.equip_desc: This build poses strong presence in team fights

hero.hero_overview: Lylia is a highly mobile and burst-damage mage known for her ability to control the battlefield with her explosive magical powers. She excels in poking enemies from a distance, controlling areas with her AoE spells, and creating chaos with her ability to reposition herself quickly.
hero.hero_strength: Lylia has a strong laning advantage due to her excellent poke damage and wave-clear abilities. Her Magic Shockwave allows her to harass enemies from a distance, while Black Shoes helps her escape ganks. This makes her dominant in the early game, controlling the lane and securing resources, although she remains vulnerable to crowd control if mispositioned.
hero.hero_weakness: Lylia lacks a reliable escape mechanism, making her easy to target by assassins or other high-damage heroes if caught off guard.

spell.spell_desc: Debuffs crowd control, stun and other disabling effects which applies for lylia's significant threat

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Carmilla's stun and slow effects would benefit lylia more to bully and easily catch the enemy's main dmg dealer.

counters.counter_desc: Lylia is squishy once her ult is in cooldown. Ling has the advantage to easily catch her with his 2nd skill and burst her with his ult.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Early game - During the first 20 seconds of the game, she should use her first stack of 2nd skill and 1st skill to help their jungler kill the buffs easily, after clearing her lane she should rotate in exp lane to bully the enemy's exp lane to lower their chances of cutting lanes. 

Team Fights - 10 seconds before the turtle or Lord, she should spawn her second skills to the bush to easily check the enemy's position. once the jungler or roamer has been spotted she should spam her skill to zone

emblems.emblem_desc: Since she is a mage who continously deals magic dmg she should use Mage emblem. Inspire, for additional cd reduction especially on her 2nd skill. Bargain hunter, to easily buy items to maximize her dmg output. Impure rage to deal magic penetration and to maximize her mana usage since she will be spamming her second skill.

hero.hero_weakness: Once Ultimate is used she is pretty squishy

spell.spell_desc: Her ult can be use as offense and defense, In order for her to maximize her passive she sould be immune to any slow or cc

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Lylia with guinever roam works well they can easily ambush enemy from bush. 
Lylia lacks cc ability with can be covered by guineveres cc capabilities.

counters.counter_desc: Lylia works well against sustainable heroes or healers like estes because for her high aoe dps
It's hard to target hero's with high mobility while playing lylia. They can just deal damage and make lylia use her all skills and run away or if her ultimate is in CD she dies easily.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Use her 2nd skill to check bush. Her 2nd skill gives vision of bush. 

Farm till your build reach 30 to 40% CD reduction that when she shins most. Her non stop spamming 2nd skill melts all kind of heroes

equips.equip_desc:
Lylia's build consist of CD and aoe burst damage. Try to get enchanted talisman as soon as possible it helps her to maintain mana and 2nd skill quickly stack up. 

Glowing wand is optional depend on enemy. 

Wishing lantern works very well with her burst dps for all kind of enemy.

hero.hero_overview: Lylia can be consider highest dps mage in game. Her combo can reach up to 3000 magic damage per 2nd skill in late game. She can wipeout enemy team easily if she can get free hit during fights.
hero.hero_strength: When combo with some nice cc and setter tanks she can kill all enemy in one fight because hero aoe continue damage is too much. Her ultimate with purify can save her from almost all kind of situations.
hero.hero_weakness: Talking about her weakness she have no crowd control ability and enemy can run away from her attack range with dash or flicker, so it recommend to use her with some good cc heroes.

spell.spell_desc: Her ultimate and purify works so well. It can save her from many 1shot heroes and wroks well in team fights too.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Being an aoe mage, lylia fits well with most frontline heroes but a good tigreal can make it much easier for lylia to deal DMG from the back, tigreal ult can can stun and pile enemies together for lylia to deal high aoe damage to them, additionally tigreal cc makes it easy for lylia to land skills
Just like tigreal, atlas is another frontline tank who can set up enemies for lylia aoe to deal a high amount of DMG with cc making it easier for lylia to deal significant DMG
Fredrin is a sturdy frontline hero with good cc. His frontlining capabilities alongside chain cc helps lylia to dish out DMG from behind

counters.counter_desc: Fanny is an extremely agile assassin making it hard for lylia to hit her with skills and lylia doesn't possess any cc skills to stop her either. Fanny can dive lylia easily
From personal experience, leomord can be a big threat to Lylia to due to his his mobility can skills to dive and finish off lylia, he can chase her down with his ult and it'snt affected much by slows
Lylia is a good counter to zhask due to her glooms sieging, she can easily bait zhask into using his ult, destroy his spawns with her skill 2 and escape his ult with her own ult

dominants.dominant_desc:
Some tips from a pro lylia player 
1) in the starting, help the jungler by using skill 1 two times with some basic atks on the buff they started to help them farm faster, no need to use skill two save it to clear minions 

2) use skill 1 and 2 combo to clear minions fast and help either jungler with litho or second buff or rotate to a lane if you're sure or you can help the roamer if he tries to invade 

3) use lylia skill 2 is bushes to get vision of potentially hidden enemies
dominants.dominant_title: Lylia has two of her skills unlocked at level one, furthermore her early game DMG is extremely good making her a good early to mid hero

emblems.emblem_desc: Mage emblem for some early game magic power, pen and cooldown reduction. The first talent can be changed to agility if required while magic shop to get equipment faster with impure to higher hp DMG and mana regen
emblems.emblem_title: Standard Early game pen and dmg

emblems.emblem_desc: Support emblem with first cdr talent gives a headstart of 15 cdr and after building magic shoes and talisman Lylia can complete 45% cdr within 4-5 mins only allowing her to build raw DMG or pen later without thinking of CDR. Although u may lack early DMG with support emblem but it'll be compensated later in game

equips.equip_desc: Lylia needs cooldown reduction to continuously spam her second skill which is her main damage source, this build allows lylia to have Cooldown (10% from shoes, 20% from talisman and another 10% from wishing lantern) decent magic power and penetration for an all round performance. Ice queen makes it easy for her to land her skills as she relies mostly on slows and wishing lantern, blood wings and Devine gives per magic power and penetration to fight against both squishy and tanky enemies
equips.equip_title: Standard Mid lane high cdr with high DMG and slow

equips.equip_desc: This build is a little different from her usual build but it focuses on countering those high cc burst heroes if you seem to struggle against them. It has cooldown reduction from shoes, cod and bruteforce, good survivability because of cod and bruteforce passive, enough DMG and magic pen alongside ice queen to slow enemies (remember this is a situational build it's still recommended to use her standard build most of the times)
equips.equip_title: Sustain mid lane build against High burst and one shotters

hero.hero_overview: Lylia, the former top student of the magic academy and harley's classmate. A mage with a potential to carry games yet being underrated Bec of her difficulty. This guide contains her pros, cons, best builds and tips for you to fully maximize and realise the true potential of this tiny mage
hero.hero_strength:
Being a hero who've two of her skills unlocked at level one, you can already tell that Lylia is a early game hero. Her main strengths include her ability to clear lanes relatively fast than compared to other mages which allows her to rotate and provide help to other parts of the map quicker

2) lylia early game DMG is pretty solid making her a good pick if you're going trying to invade enemies early on or want a early game advantage in the match her survivability is also better than other mages
hero.hero_weakness: Agile heroes especially fast assasins who can dive in easily are lylia's biggest weakness as being a mage without any cc skills it's hard for her to aim skills against fast heroes she's also vulnerable to cc burst, a chain of two or more cc skills can disrupt her from using ultimate to escape

data.recommend:

spell.spell_desc: Purify is simply the best battle spell for lylia, as mentioned earlier she's very vulnerable to cc burst as it prevents her from using her ultimate. Purify helps lylia to cancel such cc debuffs on her providing her a chance to use ultimate to outplay enemies and reposition again

hero.hero_overview: Lylia is one of the best mage heroes in Mobile Legends.
hero.hero_strength:

- Large area attack

data.recommend: Best Items For Lylia - Very recommended for Season 34.

spell.spell_desc: Very recommended to use this spell.

data.title: Best Items for Lylia - Season 34

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Lylia synchronizes well with Angela due to their aggressive skill mechanics. Angela can use her ultimate on Lylia to give her some survivability and greater movements which allows Lylia to reposition herself properly. Followed by the slows from Angela's skills and Lylia's skills and her key item "Ice Queen Wand", it'll be impossible for the enemy heroes to not hate this combo.

counters.counter_desc: Lylia is really weak against Cecilion in Mid-Late Game. Cecilion's high burst and mobility from his ultimate is a nightmare to a Lylia. He can either force Lylia to use her Ultimate, or eliminate her with just 2 Bat Impacts.

dominants.dominant_desc: Focus on damaging and harassing your opponents, avoid getting traded.
Prioritize the enemy mage and zone them out, mages are extremely powerful during teamfights.

emblems.emblem_desc: Lylia must focus on farming her core equipments (Bargain Hunter) and farming Cooldown Reduction stats (Inspire), because these stats and equipments will help her be more aggressive in early to mid game since she can deal continuous damage. Her battlefield control and damage suits well with Warcry talent that helps her increase her damage output by 8%.

equips.equip_desc: The cooldown reduction stats on Lylia helps her to regenerate her Second Skill easily. Enchanted Talisman helps her a lot with the Mana regeneration as well as the additional 5% on the maximum cooldown reduction limit. Glowing Wand in the early game provides her with HP and Movement Speed for survivability, SCORCH for melting down tanky heroes, and LIFEBANE for decreased heling or shielding to the enemy team. Ice Queen Wand helps her to land her skills properly thanks to it's passive ICE BOUND.

hero.hero_overview: Lylia is a fun-sieging mage who excels at zoning enemies with her Gloom. Combine her playstyle mechanics with proper positioning and skill landing will make you love this hero.
hero.hero_strength: In early laning, Lylia can fast clear or harass the enemy mid laner and roamer. She primarily excels at hunting down enemy heroes, sieging enemy heroes at the turrets, zone enemy mid laners, deal continuous burst damage, and deceive enemies with your ultimate.
hero.hero_weakness: Lylia is weak against heroes with long rage skills and high burst capabilities, she is also unmatched to a team composition that has many crowd controls that can lock her down or force her to use Black Shoes (Ultimate skill).

spell.spell_desc: Normally Lylia would go for Flicker or Sprint, but due to the meta where hard crowd controls are priority, go for Purify since it provides some movement speed and additional survivability for ganks and crowd controls.

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Tigreal initiates with Implosion, Lylia follows with Shadow Wave.

Lylia uses Shadow Ball to harass, Tigreal provides cover with his shield.

Tigreal's ultimate, Sacred Hammer, pairs well with Lylia's Darkening.

Coordinate timing for optimal synergy.

Manage Tigreal's aggression to avoid overextending.

Balance damage output and protection.
Any types of tank that can set.
Best duo.

counters.counter_desc: Fanny can evade Lylia abilities.
Hard to kill so, you need to use purify as battle spell.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Manage mana and cooldowns efficiently.
Use Shadow Wave to control enemy movements.
Stay aware of your surroundings and enemy positions.
Utilize Lylia's high damage potential in team fights.
Adapt to enemy strategies and adjust your playstyle.
Focus on ultimate timing to turn team fights.
Use Darkening to silence enemy carries.
Stay mobile and avoid direct confrontations.

Combos:

1. Shadow Ball—Shadow Wave—Darkening (high damage combo)
2. Shadow—Wave Shadow—Ball Flicker (escape)

emblems.emblem_desc: Lylia's emblems focus on amplifying her magical damage and durability. Also for cooldown reduction, movement speed in the jungle and river, and damage.
Best recommendation for Lylia.

equips.equip_desc:
Magic boots: Enchances magical damage and mobility.
Enchanted Talisman: increases magical damage and sustain.
Ice Queen Wand: Controls enemies movement and enchances damage.
Wishing Lantern: Increases magical damage and penetration. 
Glowing Wand: Enchances magical damage and ability spam.
Divine Glaive: High magical Damage and penetration.
More damage for Lylia.
Easy kill for enemies.

hero.hero_overview: Lylia is a mysterious and powerful mage who manipulates shadows to outmaneuver her enemies. She excels at dealing magical damage and controlling team fights.
hero.hero_strength: Lylia deals massive magical damage, especially with her ultimate, Darkening. Her abilities (Shadow Wave and Darkening) provide excellent crowd control, allowing her team to take advantage. Shadow Energy (passive) grants Lylia increased movement speed, making her formidable in roaming and ganking. Shadow Wave helps Lylia initiate team fights or quickly escape danger.
hero.hero_weakness:
1. Low Health: Lylia has relatively low health, making her vulnerable to burst damage.

2. Cooldown: Her abilities have moderate to long cooldowns, limiting her damage output between cooldowns.

3. Low Mana: Lylia consumes mana quickly, especially when spamming Shadow Ball.

4. Limited Engage: Shadow Wave's relatively short range limits Lylia's initiation potential.

data.recommend: Lylia Guide!!! (THIS IS ONLY MY OPINION/REVIEW FOR LYLIA!)💜

spell.spell_desc:
Recommended Battle Spells:

1. Flicker: Enhances Lylia's mobility and escape capabilities.

2. Purify: Provides protection against enemy crowd control and debuffs.

data.title: Lylia
